# Biagio Scaglia - Portfolio & CV

Interactive Windows 7-style portfolio and professional CV.

## Profile
Full Stack & Mobile Developer and UX/UI Designer based in Bari/Modugno, Italy. Specialized in creating scalable web and mobile applications with clean code, modern architectures, and polished user experiences.

## Core Information
- **Full Name:** Biagio Scaglia
- **Role:** Software Developer & UX/UI Designer
- **Location:** Bari, Puglia, Italy
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/biagio-scaglia
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/biagio-scaglia
- **Portfolio Website:** https://biagio-scaglia.github.io/portfolio/

---

## Technical Stack

### Programming Languages
- TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Java, PHP, C# (.NET)

### Frontend & Mobile
- React, React Native, Flutter, Astro, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, TailwindCSS, Angular, Vue

### Backend & Database
- .NET (C#), Express (Node.js), Laravel (PHP), MySQL, JSON

### Design & Tools
- Figma, Canva, Git, GitHub

---

## Work Experience

### Freelance Web & Mobile Developer
**Biagio Scaglia Dev - Autonomo** | *Maggio 2026 - Presente*
- Building digital products and custom solutions from scratch.
- Developed mobile apps with Flutter for Android and web apps with modern frontend and backend tech.
- Created the Vellum app on Google Play Store.

### Full Stack Developer (.NET / React)
**Prisma Srl - A tempo pieno** | *Febbraio 2026 - Presente*
- Developing modern, scalable web applications using .NET for the backend and React for the frontend.
- Integrating REST APIs and managing database architectures.

### Telegram Bot Developer
**Pokémon Go - Raid Italia - Remote** | *Aprile 2026 - Giugno 2026*
- Programmed and optimized custom automation bots using Python.
- Designed multi-channel content categorization, automated deals forwarding, and interactive telegram UI buttons.

### Sviluppatore Web (Frontend Developer)
**Yumeverse Games - Remote** | *Dicembre 2025 - Giugno 2026*
- Created interactive, high-performance landing pages using Astro and JavaScript for an indie game studio.

### Sviluppatore Applicazioni Mobili
**sgamapp - A tempo pieno** | *Settembre 2025 - Febbraio 2026*
- Built sgamapp web and mobile applications for the JOB&Orienta event in Verona, aiming to reduce the digital gap.

### Sviluppatore di Software
**PASSBARI - Modugno, Italia** | *Agosto 2025 - Agosto 2025*
- Developed and optimized responsive web and mobile applications.

### Consulente AI
**Consorzio Artemide - Bari, Italia** | *Giugno 2024 - Dicembre 2024*
- Implemented marketing strategies and managed technical AI-driven marketing campaigns.

## Notable Projects
- **Vellum:** Custom Android application built with Flutter. (URL: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.biagioscaglia.vellum)
- **sgamapp:** Web/mobile application reducing the digital gap for vulnerable users, featured at JOB&Orienta in Verona.
- **Raid Italia Bot:** Automated deals engine and Telegram bot built with Python.
- **Yumeverse Games Landing Page:** Interactive frontend site created with Astro.
